name: native_control_plane_cutover
outcome_goal: Make the native control plane the explicit fastest path by hardening cutover admission, bus-brain frontdoor ownership, and cockpit proof into one bounded packet.
anti_requirements: Do not introduce a hosted dashboard or a second read-model truth seam.
Do not let shell wrappers or ambient env flags act as the promotion source of truth.
Do not keep generic builder behavior masquerading as a native control plane.

jobs.label: native_primary_gate_contract
jobs.prompt: Finish the native-primary admission seam so one stored cutover gate, one decision contract, and one proof path define bounded native-primary use. No shell-owned fallback admission.

jobs.label: native_frontdoor_and_bus_brain_cutover
jobs.prompt: Cut the bus-brain and native frontdoor story over to one control-plane path. The native surface should prove route, dispatch, and cutover truth without falling back to generic builder or legacy wrapper behavior.

jobs.label: native_cockpit_proof
jobs.prompt: Prove the cockpit is the bounded native read model, not a decorative shell. Cover control, truth, drift detection, and fail-closed behavior when route or cutover authority is missing.
